parameters.query:
INSERT INTO backlink_opportunities (
    analysis_id,
    domain_rating_score,
    relevance_score,
    difficulty_score,
    final_score,
    priority,
    suggested_action,
    created_at
)
VALUES (
    '{{ $json.analysis_id }}',
    {{ $json.domain_rating_score }},
    {{ $json.relevance_score }},
    {{ $json.difficulty_score }},
    {{ $json.final_score }},
    '{{ $json.priority }}',
    '{{ $json.suggested_action }}',
    NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (analysis_id)
DO UPDATE SET
    domain_rating_score = EXCLUDED.domain_rating_score,
    relevance_score = EXCLUDED.relevance_score,
    difficulty_score = EXCLUDED.difficulty_score,
    final_score = EXCLUDED.final_score,
    priority = EXCLUDED.priority,
    suggested_action = EXCLUDED.suggested_action;

SELECT
    c.company_name AS competitor,

    bs.source_domain AS backlink_domain,

    cb.source_url,

    cb.anchor_text,

    ba.domain_rating,

    ba.authority_score,

    ba.link_type,

    ba.recommendation,

    bo.domain_rating_score,

    bo.relevance_score,

    bo.difficulty_score,

    bo.final_score,

    bo.priority,

    bo.suggested_action

FROM backlink_opportunities bo

JOIN backlink_analysis ba
ON bo.analysis_id = ba.id

JOIN competitor_backlinks cb
ON ba.competitor_backlink_id = cb.id

JOIN competitors c
ON cb.competitor_id = c.id

JOIN backlink_sources bs
ON cb.backlink_source_id = bs.id

WHERE
    DATE(bo.created_at) = CURRENT_DATE
    AND bo.priority IN ('HIGH','MEDIUM')
    AND ba.domain_rating > 60

ORDER BY
CASE
    WHEN bo.priority='HIGH' THEN 1
    WHEN bo.priority='MEDIUM' THEN 2
END,
bo.final_score DESC;

SELECT
    ba.id AS analysis_id,
    ba.competitor_backlink_id,

    ba.source_domain,
    ba.domain_rating,

    ba.authority_score,
    ba.relevance_score,
    ba.spam_score,
    ba.opportunity_score,

    ba.link_type,

    ba.recommendation,

    ba.analyzed_at

FROM backlink_analysis ba

LEFT JOIN backlink_opportunities bo
ON ba.id = bo.analysis_id

WHERE
    bo.id IS NULL
    AND DATE(ba.analyzed_at) = CURRENT_DATE;
